overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a player character walking through a foggy, rocky wilderness landscape and approaching a small campsite with horses, canvas tents, and an NPC. The scene features stormy overcast skies and atmospheric fog throughout.

events.description: distant campsite with tents becomes visible through the fog

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through foggy grassland toward distant rock formations

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock outcrops rising from the grass
tall green grass covering the ground
thick mist and fog obscuring distant views
tall rock formations barely visible through the fog
rocks strewn across the grassy landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy wilderness landscape with rocky outcrops and tall grass. The camera moves forward through the misty terrain, and toward the end, a distant campsite with tents becomes visible through the fog, signaling the destination ahead.

events.description: horses come into view near the camp tents

agents.ego_description: walking toward the campsite, passing the horses and wooden wagon

notable_agents.action: horse standing tethered near the wooden wagon
second horse grazing near the tent

entered.detail: canvas tents set up in a clearing
saddled horses standing at the camp

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the wilderness camp, revealing canvas tents and a wooden wagon. Two horses stand near the camp, one tethered to the wagon and another grazing. The rocky terrain shifts to the left as the camera moves closer to the camp center.

scene_state.functional_zone: active campsite with cooking fire and NPC

events.description: NPC sitting by tent becomes clearly visible
warm light from campfire becomes prominent as camera approaches

agents.ego_description: moving through the camp, observing the NPC and cooking setup

notable_agents.action: camp member sitting on the ground working with tools near the tent

entered.detail: large white canvas tent with wooden support poles
metal pot suspended over the fire on a tripod
simple wooden bench near the fire

segments.scene_description: Moving into the camp interior, the camera passes close to a large canvas tent where an NPC sits working on the ground. A campfire burns brightly with a cooking pot suspended over it, casting warm light on the surroundings. The horses are now visible in the background as the camera focuses on the camp's living area.

events.description: camera pans to show drying rack with hanging herbs and equipment

agents.ego_description: examining the camp's storage area and drying rack

entered.detail: wooden frame with herbs and plants hanging to dry
wooden table with papers and bottles
wooden boxes and supplies on the ground

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the camp's equipment area, revealing a wooden drying rack with hanging herbs, a desk with scattered papers and bottles, and storage crates. The campfire and main tent recede into the background as the camera explores this functional corner of the campsite.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty wilderness that gradually reveals and enters a detailed survival campsite. It begins by pushing through a foggy landscape of rocky outcrops and tall grass, where a distant cluster of tents slowly emerges from the haze. As the camera approaches the camp, the terrain shifts to the left to reveal a wooden wagon and tethered horses before moving deeper into the camp's interior. The scene then transitions past a large canvas tent and a brightly burning campfire with a suspended cooking pot, shifting the lighting from cold gray to warm orange. Finally, the camera glides away from the central living area to focus on a functional equipment corner featuring a wooden drying rack with hanging herbs, scattered papers on a desk, and storage crates.
